ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "energy_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., natural gas, solar, wind, battery) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "capacity_mw" REAL /* Maximum capacity in megawatts */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy source was commissioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area in square kilometers */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone (e.g., temperate, arid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy production record */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "time_index" INTEGER /* Time index for the energy production record */,
  "production_level" REAL /* Production level of the energy source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., MW, GW) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the production record */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy analyst, regulator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Analytics, Regulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_storage" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery storage record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "time_index" INTEGER /* Time index for the battery storage record */,
  "storage_level" REAL /* Storage level of the battery */,
  "capacity_kwh" REAL /* Capacity in kilowatt-hours */,
  "charge_status" TEXT /* Current charge status (e.g., full, half) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_storage_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source being accessed */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy production forecast */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time of the forecast */,
  "production_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted production level */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast (0-1) */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Forecasting model used (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_forecasts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_forecasts_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id")
)
